arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Christopher Nkunku 'attracting interest from five clubs'
arts.sum: Chelsea forward Christopher Nkunku is allegedly attracting interest from at least five clubs ahead of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Everton vs Chelsea – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Everton welcome Chelsea to Goodison Park for the final time in a league fixture this afternoon. Sean Dyche’s side are looking to build on a goalless draw at Arsenal last weekend as the Blues stifled the North London side at the Emirates. arts.ttl: Revealed: Why Chelsea can't wait to wave goodbye to their bogey ground Goodison Park - as they look to go top of the Premier League for the first time in three years against Everton
arts.sum: A meeting of sides at either ends of the table should be easy to call but Chelsea 's recent record on trips to Goodison Park make Sunday's match a toss-up.

arts.ttl: Chelsea XI vs Everton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea make the trip to Everton on Sunday afternoon, with a chance to move top of the Premier League table. Enzo Maresca’s side are searching for a sixth straight win in the Premier League, having closed the gap on leaders Liverpool to two points. arts.ttl: Everton vs Chelsea – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Everton host in-form Chelsea in the Premier League on Sunday at Goodison Park. The home side will be looking to build upon their hard-fought goalless draw at Arsenal last weekend. Dwight McNeil is ‘touch-and-go’ for the clash after he missed the draw against Arsenal with a knee injury. arts.ttl: I regret leaving Chelsea to join Arsenal - I wanted to leave after three months
arts.sum: Willian has admitted that he wanted to leave Arsenal after just three months under Mikel Arteta. For me, it’s unfair to stay in a place that you don’t want to stay just because of the money.

arts.ttl: 'I was really upset': Pedro Neto shares the Chelsea match that left him so disappointed this season
arts.sum: 'I just want to enjoy my football.'

arts.ttl: Mykhailo Mudryk angers Chelsea fans with Usyk vs Fury actions
arts.sum: Mykhailo Mudryk has angered Chelsea fans further after he flew to Saudi Arabia to watch Tyson Fury’s fight against Oleksandr Usyk on Saturday. A statement from Chelsea on Tuesday read: "Chelsea Football Club can confirm the Football Association recently contacted our player Mykhailo Mudryk concerning an adverse finding in a routine urine test.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 'target' £41m transfer as Axel Disasi 'makes decision' about his future
arts.sum: Chelsea and Tottenham are among the clubs targeting £41m Feyenoord defender David Hancko, according to reports. Elsewhere, while rumours surrounding defensive reinforcements intensify, current Chelsea star Axel Disasi has been linked with a move away from the club in recent weeks.
